title: Computer on Treadmill  - WATCH THIS VIDEO!!!!!!!

transcript.text: Hello, this is the most important video you could ever, ever, ever, ever, ever, ever, ever, ever watch.
It's multitasking in its most maximum.
It's working on your computer while you're on the treadmill and the Stairmaster.
I wear my little glove shoes, toughen up my feet, and I got the computer.
That is my mouse.
I'm going at 3.5 miles an hour, and I can do the mouse perfectly, watch.
See?
I can do that all day.
And this is how I tie it up.
String here, string here, tie it up around the top, and then down the bottom, and then I just tie it here.
And then when I'm done, I just wrap it around, and it's really not intrusive on the computer at all.
And you can attach it to any treadmill.
This particular treadmill, I have a perch with that because it needs to be steep.
And when I want to change the speed, I just lift this up, and I would just, you know, change the speed and do whatever I need.
Usually treadmills, you don't need, you don't need something to perch it up.
You can see it just fine.
And it works so when my feet start to hurt, I just go over to the Stairmaster and do that for like 380, 360 floors is my record now.
So I just do more floors each time I go over, and then I work out.
I'm at a gold student in Eugene, Springfield, and the dude at the desk gave me permission to film.

Check it out.
